name: list_salesorder
title: list_A_SalesOrder
description: Retrieve a list of entities from the A_SalesOrder collection in the api_sales_order_srv service. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, ranking ($top), skipping ($skip), expanding related entities, counting, selecting specific properties. Only use attributes in the query options that are specified in the metadata. If the structure of the entity is not known, call get_metadata_api_sales_order_srv tool first to get the metadata.

filter.title: filter
filter.description: OData $filter expression to return only entities matching specific criteria. All OData filter expressions are supported.
examples: SoldToParty eq '1000001' and CreationDate ge datetime'2025-03-01T00:00:00'

select.title: select
select.description: OData $select query option. Specify a comma-separated list of property names to include in the response.

orderby.title: orderby
orderby.description: OData $orderby query option to sort results by one or more properties.

top.title: top
top.description: OData $top query option. Maximum number of entities to return.

skip.title: skip
skip.description: OData $skip query option to skip a specified number of results.

expand.title: expand
expand.description: OData $expand query option to include related entities in the response.
